channel.title: Tops on Mengjie Xu
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on Mengjie Xu

item.description: About Me My name is Mengjie Xu. I am a Job Market Candidate at the Frankfurt School of Finance and Management. I focus on analyzing how information system design influences strategic interactions among market participants and associated market outcomes. I am particularly interested in investigating information system designs that yield welfare-improving outcomes and identify ways for enhancements when the current design falls short. In doing so, I am dedicated to offering relevant insights to practitioners and regulators.
